task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the email application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email client (e.g., Thunderbird) window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent locates and opens the specific target email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email with the subject 'Site Update - Weekly Report #47' is selected in the inbox or opened in a reading pane/new window.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the process to save the required attachments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu (right-click) or a 'Save'/'Save All' dialog is open specifically for the attachments 'project_report.pdf' and 'materials_costs.csv'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the correct target directory to save the files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file picker or save dialog is visible showing the current path as 'Documents/ProjectFiles' or '/home/ga/Documents/ProjectFiles'.

task_completion.description: Verify the files are successfully saved in the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window showing the '/home/ga/Documents/ProjectFiles' directory containing both 'project_report.pdf' and 'materials_costs.csv', or a download completion notification indicating they were saved to this path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical email client to access the email and attachments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI email application rather than using terminal commands or scripts to extract the attachments.

integrity.description: Verify the files were actually saved from the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog originates from the email client, rather than the agent just moving pre-existing files or downloading them from a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not cheat by creating dummy files using the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'touch project_report.pdf' or 'echo > materials_costs.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct email subject is 'Site Update - Weekly Report #47'. The attachments to be saved are 'project_report.pdf' and 'materials_costs.csv'. The exact target directory is '/home/ga/Documents/ProjectFiles'.
